step_rationale: Endothelin-1 mediates endothelial dysfunction, vasoconstriction, and endocardial signaling in acute MI.
mechanism: ET-1 drives endothelial activation, excessive vasoconstriction, and endocardial injury during acute MI, with predictive value for endothelial progenitor cell mobilization post-infarction.
